title: Xautoを呼び出して
summary_text: Exact drift is straightforward: 1. Test expectation: [`tests/test-kernel-canary-plan.sh:34`](file:///tmp/fugue-orchestration-hardening/tests/test-kernel-canary-plan.sh#L34) requires a workflow line matching `CANARY_REPORT_DIR: .*runner.temp`. 2. Workflow reality: [`fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml:30-58`](file:///tmp/fugue-orchestration-hardening/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml#L30) defines many env vars, but **no `CANARY_REPORT_DIR` at all**, so grep fails immediately (`FAIL: canary workflow missing report dir env`). Minimal patch (no edits made): add this one env key under `jobs.canary.env` in [`fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml`](file:///tmp/fugue-orchestration-hardening/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml): ```yaml CANARY_REPORT_DIR: ${{ runner.temp }}/fugue-orchestrator-canary ``` Note: after this, the same test will likely fail on the next checks (`Upload canary report` / `actions/upload-artifact@v7`) at [`tests/test-kernel-canary-plan.sh:38-44`](file:///tmp/fugue-orchestration-hardening/tests/test-kernel-canary-plan.sh#L38).
